'''vazacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuzeer|wuzeer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuzeer|wuzeer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzæchæth|væzæchæth]] || [[word:væzæchæj|væzæchæj]] || [[word:væzæchæsh|væzæchæsh]] || [[word:væzæchæ|væzæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazazachath|vazazachath]] || [[word:vazazachaj|vazazachaj]] || [[word:vazazachash|vazazachash]] || [[word:vazazacha|vazazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazachath|vazachath]] || [[word:vazachaj|vazachaj]] || [[word:vazachash|vazachash]] || [[word:vazacha|vazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazafchath|vazafchath]] || [[word:vazafchaj|vazafchaj]] || [[word:vazafchash|vazafchash]] || [[word:vazafchaf|vazafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazachatha|vazachatha]] || [[word:vazachaja|vazachaja]] || [[word:vazachasha|vazachasha]] || [[word:vazachaka|vazachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazachath|vazachath]] || [[word:vazachaj|vazachaj]] || [[word:vazachash|vazachash]] || [[word:vazacha|vazacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazachathal|vazachathal]] || [[word:vazachajal|vazachajal]] || [[word:vazachashal|vazachashal]] || [[word:vazachakal|vazachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazachathatha|vazachathatha]] || [[word:vazachajaja|vazachajaja]] || [[word:vazachashasha|vazachashasha]] || [[word:vazachaka|vazachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazachathan|vazachathan]] || [[word:vazachajan|vazachajan]] || [[word:vazachashan|vazachashan]] || [[word:vazachakan|vazachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazachathaoro|vazachathaoro]] || [[word:vazachajaoro|vazachajaoro]] || [[word:vazachashaoro|vazachashaoro]] || [[word:vazachakaoro|vazachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
